name: Wrapped Canton Coin
reason: $wCC (Wrapped Canton Coin) represents Canton-native value in a form that integrates with broader DeFi infrastructure, enabling trading, liquidity provision, and other onchain financial activities. It follows LayerZero’s Omnichain Fungible Token (OFT) standard for secure cross-chain interoperability. The project is a Canton Network validator and featured app, and our core infrastructure (The Portal and The Vault) has been security audited by Halborn, ensuring legitimacy. $wCC currently has over $100K in DEX liquidity on PancakeSwap.
